title: AuraMobs
description: A mob levels add-on for AuraSkills
body:
# AuraMobs AuraMobs is an add-on for AuraSkills that adds mob levels based on skill levels.

**Dev builds are available [here](https://aurelium.dev/auramobs/download?channel=dev)** ## Features - **Mob levels** - Make mobs spawn with more health and damage based on players' skill levels - **Formula-based** - Customize formulas for mob and player levels with many placeholder options and PlaceholderAPI support. - **Modify XP** - Increase the AuraSkills skill XP gained from mobs depending on mob level. - **Other Features** - Change mob movement speed and scale, whitelist/blacklist worlds, add separate formulas for bosses, and custom name tags. ## Dependencies - [AuraSkills](https://modrinth.com/plugin/auraskills) - Java 21+
